source_issue.title: We need to recreate the sponsorship form

summary_markdown:
```markdown
## What this issue is about
This issue addresses the need to recreate the sponsorship form for Plone at [plone.org](https://plone.org/foundation/sponsorship). Currently, the earlier form was replaced by a mailto link, and we need to restore a more interactive and informative form for potential sponsors.

## What needs to be done
We need to develop a new sponsorship form that collects essential information from sponsors. The form should also guide users on different types of sponsorship (e.g., Premium, Standard, Basic, University) and link to our GitHub sponsors page instead of PayPal.

## Helpful background
Previously, we had several references for the sponsorship form, including: 
- [Sponsorship form](https://old.plone.org/sponsors/sponsorship-form?type-of-sponsorship=Premium)
- [Be a Hero page](https://old.plone.org/sponsors/be-a-hero) 

These pages provide essential context on what information to collect and how to present it effectively.

## Good first steps
1. Review the references noted above to understand the required fields and layout.
2. Explore using the Volto forms block, as suggested.
3. Begin drafting the form structure and gather feedback from the team.
4. Consider testing the form for functionality before finalizing it.
5. Coordinate with the team for documentation and review once the form is ready.
```
